name: PubChem PUG REST API
what_it_does: Provides programmatic access to NIH's PubChem database of 100M+ chemical compounds, including structures, properties, safety data, bioactivity assays, and synonyms via a RESTful URL-based query system.
use_cases: Looking up chemical properties (molecular weight, formula, InChI) by name or structure
Retrieving safety and hazard data (GHS, SDS) for chemicals
Performing structure similarity or substructure searches
Mapping chemical synonyms and CAS numbers to PubChem CIDs
Fetching bioactivity data and assay results for drug discovery
not_for: Real-time reaction prediction or synthesis planning
High-throughput bulk downloads (use FTP data dumps instead)
best_when: An agent needs to look up, validate, or enrich chemical compound data including structure, properties, or safety information.
avoid_when: You need bulk data exports (use FTP), proprietary compound databases, or real-time computational chemistry.

auth.notes: No authentication required. Fully public API operated by NCBI/NIH. Rate limiting is enforced automatically (5 requests/second, 400 requests/minute) without requiring a key.

pricing.free_tier_limits: 5 requests/second, 400 requests/minute; public resource with no registration
pricing.notes: Completely free public API operated by NCBI. Rate limits apply but no paid tier exists.

performance.rate_limits: 5 requests/second, 400 requests/minute per IP; 100MB/day data download

agent_readiness.error_message_notes: Returns HTTP status codes with brief JSON fault messages. Errors like 'PUGREST.BadRequest' have codes but limited actionable detail. Structure search errors are particularly opaque.
agent_readiness.idempotency_notes: Read-only API; all requests are inherently idempotent and safe to retry after 429 rate limit responses.
known_agent_gotchas: Rate limit of 5 req/sec is easy to hit in loops; agents must add backoff or use batch endpoints
URL-path-based query syntax (e.g., /compound/name/{name}/property/{prop}/JSON) is non-standard and can confuse agents expecting query params
Async job pattern required for slow operations (structure search): must poll a job URL, not a direct response
Compound names with special characters must be URL-encoded carefully; some names still fail
PUG View and PUG REST have different URL schemes and capabilities — easy to conflate

security_score_components.security_notes: HTTPS enforced. No authentication means no scope concerns. Public read-only data. PubChemPy library is community-maintained and infrequently updated.
